items.name: Accelerating Heal
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Speed. Healing an ally also applies Rush for 1 turn
items.how_to_find: Can be found in an abandoned expedition camp on an island northeast  of the Stone Wave Cliffs. Needs Esquie's ability to swim

items.name: Accelerating Last Stand
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Speed. Gain Rush if fighting alone
items.how_to_find: Obtained upon winning your second fight against a Gestral fighter

items.name: Accelerating Shots
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. 20% chance to gain Rush on Free Aim Shot
items.how_to_find: Bought from Fusoka for 89650 Chroma after challenging him to a duel  and winning against him

items.name: Accelerating Tint
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Speed. Healing tints also apply Rush
items.how_to_find: Sold by the Gestral Merchant Anthonypo for 80040 Chroma

items.name: Aegis Revival
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. +1 Shield on being revived
items.how_to_find: From the abandoned Expedition Camp, break through the Paint Spike to the  right of Jar. Head down the path and grapple across to the other cliff.  Defeat Grour the Merchant to unlock this item. Then it can be  purchased for 117240 Chroma

items.name: Anti-Blight
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Immune to Blight
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Chromatic Portier  Purchased from Eragol for 67350 Chroma

items.name: Anti-Burn
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Immune to Burn
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Gargant  Defeat the Gargant

items.name: Anti-Charm
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Immune to Charm
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Tisseur

items.name: Anti-Freeze
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Immune to Freeze
items.how_to_find: Obtained from the Paint Cage in Glacial Falls past the Manor entrance

items.name: Anti-Stun
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Immune to Stun
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Chromatic Petank

items.name: At Death's Door
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Crit Rate. Deal 50% more damage if Health  is below 10%
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Lampmaster  Defeat the Lampmaster

items.name: Attack Lifesteal
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Crit Rate. Recover 15% Health on Base Attack
items.how_to_find: As you go through the cave where you need to crouch to enter in Sanctuary Maze, you can find a Catapult Sakapatate beside the loot beam containing the Attack Lifesteal

items.name: Augmented Aim
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 50% increased Free Aim damage
items.how_to_find: Found atop the giant anchor in Flying Waters, accessible via a climbable pillar behind the anchor

items.name: Augmented Attack
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. 50% increased Base Attack damage
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Chromatic Lancelier

items.name: Augmented Counter I
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Crit Rate. 35% increased Counterattack damage
items.location: Flying Waters  Flying Manor  Renoir's Drafts
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Bourgeon  Defeat the Bourgeon near the Eveque bosses  Defeat Grour the Merchant to unlock this item. Then it can be purchased for 122125 Chroma

items.name: Augmented Counter II
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Crit Rate. 50% increased Counterattack damage
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Chromatic Ramasseur

items.name: Augmented Counter III
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Crit Rate. 75% increased Counterattack damage
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Chromatic Echassier  Defeat the Danseuse Teacher

items.name: Augmented First Strike
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 50% increased damage on the first hit. Once per battle
items.how_to_find: Defeat Francois  Defeat Grour the Merchant to unlock this item. Augmented First Strike can be purchased for 117240 Chroma

items.name: Auto Death
items.effect: Attributes: Crit Rate. Kill self on battle start
items.how_to_find: Can be purchased from the Merchant Pinabby for 5320 Chroma

items.name: Auto Powerful
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Apply Powerful for 3 turns on battle start
items.how_to_find: Complete Chalier Nevron's quest

items.name: Auto Regen
items.effect: Attributes: Defense. Apply Regen for 3 turns on battle start
items.how_to_find: After unlocking the platform at the end of the path from the Dancing Classes, head into the path on the right, and follow the ribbon on the right side going down to fight a Benisseur, you can pick up the picto on the side

items.name: Auto Rush
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Apply Rush for 3 turns on battle start
items.how_to_find: From the Left Street, head down and through the broken wall to an open field. Continue on the left path, then follow the right. Past the alley, continue down on the left. Continue going down the narrow road until you reach an open field. Go through the archway on the left, take out the enemies and pick up the picto

items.name: Auto Shell
items.effect: Attributes: Health. Apply Shell for 3 turns on battle start
items.how_to_find: Complete Hexga Nevron's quest

items.name: Base Shield
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. +1 Shield if not affected by any Shield on turn start
items.how_to_find: Complete all the challenges to unlock the door in this location. You'll find this inside the locked room, next to a mirror

items.name: Beneficial Contamination
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. +2 AP on applying a Status Effect. Once per turn
items.how_to_find: Can be purchased from Persik for 48200 Chroma

items.name: Break Specialist
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Speed. Break damage is increased by 50%, but base damage is reduced by 20%
items.how_to_find: Bought from Fusoka for 81500 Chroma after challenging him to a duel and winning

items.name: Breaker
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 25% increased Break damage
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Ultimate Sakapatate

items.name: Breaking Attack
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Base Attack can Break
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Clair Obscur in Tainted Lumiere

items.name: Breaking Burn
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 25% increased Break damage on Burning enemies
items.how_to_find: Southwest of Old Lumiere, behind a Bourgeon

items.name: Breaking Counter
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 50% increased Break damage on Counterattack
items.how_to_find: After the Entrance, go into the left jar structure to find this Pictos

items.name: Breaking Death
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Fully charge enemy's Break Bar on death
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Thunder Eveque east of Stone Wave Cliffs Cave

items.name: Breaking Shots
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 50% increased Break damage with Free Aim Shots
items.how_to_find: After defeating the Gold Chevaliere, take the rope back up and follow the red flower path and stick to the path on the right. Hop across the pillars and pick up the pictos

items.name: Breaking Slow
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 25% increased Break damage against Slowed enemies
items.how_to_find: Found inside a Paint Spike in the small enclosed section to the west of Spring Meadows (needs Esquie's ability to fly)

items.name: Burn Affinity
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 25% increased damage on Burning Targets
items.how_to_find: From the Glacial Falls, continue along the path to the right, take the rope up, and head to the end to grapple across to the cliff ahead. At the end of this path, there are broken tracks and wall structures on them. Climb up the structure towards the right, turn around and grapple to the floating train. Take the rope down to pick up the pictos

items.name: Burning Break
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Crit Rate. Apply 3 Burn stacks on Breaking a target
items.how_to_find: Found on top of a structure in the left side of the field in the first area of the Glacial Falls. Head up the slope on the left and hop across to the structure to pick it up

items.name: Burning Death
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Apply 3 Burn to all enemies on Death
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Gargant

items.name: Burning Mark
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Apply Burn on hitting a Marked enemy
items.how_to_find: From the Entrance, run towards the large Gestral structure in the distance and follow the stream on the left, next to the main path will be slope leading down. Will be on a ledge after a short climb

items.name: Burning Shots
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 20% chance to Burn on Free Aim shot
items.location: Spring Meadows  Monoco's Station  Sacred River
items.how_to_find: Found sitting on the cliff on the left upon exiting the short tunnel past the Abandoned Expedition Camp  Sold by the Grandis Merchant for 53901 Chroma  Fight and win the Gestral Merchant, then it can be bought for 43391 Chroma

items.name: Charging Alteration
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. +10% of a Gradient Charge on applying a Buff: Once per turn
items.how_to_find: Found on a floating platform that can be reached by using the grappling hook. It's found in the area where you fight the Gargant and Lampmaster

items.name: Charging Attack
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. +15% of a Gradient Charge on Base Attack
items.how_to_find: From the Mountain, proceed across and grapple to the mountain. Take the left path up and climb up the wall structures at the end of this path. Grapple across and continue to the right of the Fading Man. Grapple across 2 times and turn to the crawl space on the left. Go through the crawl space and drop down the wooden ledge and pick up the pictos

items.name: Charging Burn
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Speed. +20% of a Gradient Charge on applying Burn. Once per turn
items.how_to_find: Found on the destroyed bridge behind Grour the merchant on the rooftop

items.name: Charging Counter
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. +20% of a Gradient Charge on Counterattack
items.how_to_find: From the Mountain, proceed across and grapple to the mountain. Take the left path up and climb up the wall structures at the end of this path. Grapple across and continue to the right of the Fading Man. Grapple across and go straight ahead into the field. Take out the enemies and pick up the pictos

items.name: Charging Critical
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Crit Rate. +20% of a Gradient Charge on Critical Hit. Once per turn
items.how_to_find: Rewarded for completing Stage 5, Trial 3  Go behind Grour and follow the short path, jump across the platforms on the left to pick up the pictos

items.name: Charging Mark
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. +20% of a Gradient Charge on hitting a Marked target. Once per turn
items.how_to_find: Sold by the Gestral Merchant Anthonypo for 100050 Chroma

items.name: Charging Stun
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Speed. +5% of a Gradient Charge on hitting a Stunned enemy
items.how_to_find: As you go through the Central Plaza, you can find a Young Boy along the path. Go behind the tree in the middle of the area right before the Shattered Alley to find the pictos

items.name: Charging Tint
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. +5% of a Gradient Charge on using an item
items.how_to_find: Found on a small patch of land by the Gestral Beach south of Old Lumiere, near a Stalact

items.name: Charging Weakness
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. +15% of a Gradient Charge on hitting a Weakness. Once per turn
items.how_to_find: Can be purchased from Eragol for 53880 Chroma

items.name: Cheater
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Speed. Always play twice in a row
items.how_to_find: Defeat Sprong southwest of Blades' Graveyard

items.name: Cleansing Tint
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Healing Tints also remove all Status Effects from the target
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Eveque

items.name: Clea's Life
items.effect: Attributes: Health. On turn start, if no damage taken since last turn, recover 100% Health
items.how_to_find: Defeat Clea

items.name: Combo Attack I
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Base Attack has 1 extra hit
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Dualliste

items.name: Combo Attack II
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Base Attack has 1 extra hit
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Chromatic Clair Obscur in Monolith Peak after defeating the Paintress and returning

items.name: Combo Attack III
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Base Attack has 1 extra hit
items.how_to_find: Win all three challenges to obtain this as a reward

items.name: Confident
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Take 50% less damage, but can't be Healed
items.how_to_find: Dropped from the Hexga past the Entrance

items.name: Confident Fighter
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Crit Rate. 30% increased damage, but can't be Healed
items.how_to_find: In the Joyful Vale area, head up the ramp near the mask on the right side, then defeat the Boucheclier by the ledge. After the area is clear, proceed to the area on the right to find the pictos

items.name: Critical Break
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 25% increased Break damage on Critical Hits
items.how_to_find: Found inside a Paint Spike on a beach west of the Isle of the Eyes

items.name: Critical Burn
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 25% increased Critical Chance on Burning enemies
items.how_to_find: Found at the end of the path to the right, right after taking out the first wave of Lancelier enemies past the Meadows Corridor  Sold by the Gestral Merchant Anthonypo for 100050 Chroma

items.name: Critical Moment
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 50% increased Critical Chance if Health is below 30%
items.how_to_find: Purchased from Jujubree for 5520 Chroma

items.name: Critical Stun
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Crit Rate. 100% on Critical Chance on hitting a Stunned target
items.how_to_find: Sold by the merchant for for 53880 Chroma

items.name: Critical Vulnerability
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Crit Rate. 25% increased Critical Chance on Defenceless enemies
items.how_to_find: Found in a camp surrounded by enemies in an alcove to the northwest of Falling Leaves

items.name: Critical Weakness
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 25% increased Critical Chance on Weakness
items.how_to_find: Rewarded for completing Stage 6, Trial 3

items.name: Dead Energy I
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. +3 AP on killing an enemy
items.how_to_find: Found in front of the entrance to Dark Shores, in a cluster of crates you can break apart, containing the Picto

items.name: Dead Energy II
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. +3 AP on killing an enemy
items.how_to_find: Found on a ledge at the end of the path directly to the right upon exiting the short tunnel past the Abandoned Expedition Camp

items.name: Death Bomb
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. On Death, deal damage to all enemies
items.how_to_find: From Harvester's Hollow, head down the path and go towards the slope on the right. To the right of that slope, you can pick up the pictos

items.name: Defensive Mode
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. On receiving damage, consume 1 AP to take 30% less damage, if possible
items.how_to_find: After unlocking Esquie's swim ability, enter Stone Wave Cliffs and directly to the left, you can pick up the pictos

items.name: Dodger
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Gain 1 AP on Perfect Dodge. Once per turn

items.name: Double Burn
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. On applying a Burn stack, apply a second one
items.how_to_find: In the Anger Vale area, you can find a cavern on the right side. Enter it, then follow the left path to find a Moissonneuse with two Bouchecliers. Defeat the enemies, then pick up the pictos beside the remains of a human  Sold by the merchant for for 89800 Chroma

items.name: Double Mark
items.effect: Attributes: Speed. Mark requires 1 more hit to be removed
items.how_to_find: Can be purchased from Klaudiso for 42400 Chroma

items.name: Draining Cleanse
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Consume 1 AP to prevent Status Effects application, if possible
items.how_to_find: From the Entrance, grapple across to the next tower, continue ahead, and grapple onto the next tower. Proceed ahead and take the rope down. From there, take the path on the right, defeat the Orphelin and pick up the pictos

items.name: Effective Heal
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Double all Heals received
items.how_to_find: From the dancing classes flag, keep going straight and hug the left side. Should be a room with a light robe going down, go straight to pick up the pictos

items.name: Effective Support
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Speed. +2 AP on using an item
items.how_to_find: Found on the ground in a small patch of land northeast of Sirene

items.name: Empowering Attack
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Gain Powerful for 1 turn on Base Attack

items.name: Empowering Break
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Gain Powerful on Breaking a target
items.how_to_find: Found in the area where you fight Goblu. When you enter, there's a chroma rope that you can zip to the lower section of the area. You'll see a Cruler enemy roaming around and blocking the path where the item is

items.name: Empowering Dodge
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 5% increased damage for each consecutive successful Dodge. Can stack up to 10 times
items.how_to_find: A little north of the Endless Night Sanctuary in an abandoned camp in the top left corner. Right across from 3 enemies

items.name: Empowering Last Stand
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Crit Rate. Gain Powerful if fighting alone
items.how_to_find: Defeat Julien Tiny Head

items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Each successful Parry increases damage by 5% until end of the following turn. Taking any damage removes this buff

items.effect: Attributes: Health, Speed. Healing Tints also apply Powerful
items.how_to_find: From the Battlefield, head through the trenches on the right side of the Fading Woman, then follow the path on the right side. Climb the rope, and you will find the pictos across the wooden path  Rewarded for completing Stage 8, Trial 3

items.name: Energetic Healer

items.how_to_find: Lampmaster fight area, by the broken picture frame to the left

items.name: Energising Break
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. +3 AP on breaking an enemy

items.name: Energising Burn
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. +1 AP on applying Burn. Once per turn
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Chromatic Veilleur

items.name: Energising Death
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. On death, +4 AP to allies
items.how_to_find: In the Fort Ruins section, head inside the structure to find a Chalier. Defeat it, then head to the ledge it was blocking to find the pictos  Sold by the Grandis Merchant for 58800 Chroma

items.name: Energising Gradient
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. +1 AP per Gradient Charge consumed
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Frost Eveque east of Monoco's Station

items.name: Energising Heal
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Speed. On Healing an ally, also give 2 AP
items.how_to_find: On the beach just below the Endless Tower

items.name: Energising Jump
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Speed. +1 AP on Jump Counterattack
items.how_to_find: Found on the left side of the starting area

items.name: Energising Pain
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. No longer gain AP on Parry. +1 AP on getting hit
items.how_to_find: Follow the main path all the way to the destroyed airship. Go through the tunnel that was left by the remnants of the airship, then cross the platform to reach the other side. Stay on this path until you encounter a duo of a Greatsword Cultist and Reaper Cultist near the bridge. Defeat them to get the pictos  From the Central Plaza, go through the arch on the right and use the lift to get to the bottom level. Defeat the Greatsword Cultist standing on the structure on the left side of the area to receive the pictos

items.name: Energising Parry
items.effect: Attributes: Health. +1 AP on successful Parry
items.location: Forgotten Battlefield  Renoir's Drafts  Sacred River
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Chromatic Luster  Sold by the Gestral Merchant for 78575 Chroma  Can be purchased from Gour the Merchant for 170975 Chroma

items.name: Energising Powerful
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. Give 2 AP on applying Powerful
items.how_to_find: At the Harbour section, once you get to the rooftop section, follow the path on the right until you reach the spot where you started in the Prologue. Inside the trellis area, you can find the pictos

items.name: Energising Revive
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. +3 AP to all allies when revived
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Chromatic Hexga

items.name: Energising Rush
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. Give 2 AP on applying Rush
items.how_to_find: Rewarded for completing Stage 2, Trial 3

items.name: Energising Shell
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. Give 2 AP on applying Shell
items.how_to_find: Found in a paint spike in the area of the Chromatic Petank to the east of The Meadows

items.name: Energising Shots
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 20% chance to gain 1 AP on Free Aim shot
items.how_to_find: Found on the left side of Goblu's arena

items.name: Energising Start I
items.effect: Attributes: Health. +1 AP on battle start
items.how_to_find: Found on the right side of the beach behind the Gestral Village

items.name: Energising Start II
items.effect: Attributes: Health. +1 AP on battle start
items.how_to_find: From the Sanctuary Maze, stay on the right path and go through the crouch hole. From there take the right path and go forward until you reach the end of the room with a Ranger Sakapatate. You will be able to climb the ledge on the left and find the picos at the end of the path

items.name: Energising Start III
items.effect: Attributes: Health. +1 AP on battle start
items.how_to_find: After Esquie joins your party, cross the pillar and use your grappling hook to get across, head down the path until the very end to find this pictos on the edge of the ledge

items.name: Energising Start IV

items.name: First Offensive

items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Play first

items.name: Greater Shell
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. +10% to Shell damage reduction
items.how_to_find: After interacting with the second strange figure and taking the podium down, turn right at the path and head to the end to pick up the pictos

items.name: Greater Slow
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. +15% to Slow Speed reduction
items.how_to_find: Requires Esquie's fly ability to reach the location. Found on a broken set of stairs past the Chromatic Glaise

items.name: Healing Boon
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. Heal 15% HP on applying a buff
items.how_to_find: Found on the unreachable ledge in the Ladder Area. Players will need to take the hot air balloon from the Foggy Area located near Eragol the merchant

items.name: Healing Counter
items.effect: Attributes: Health. Recover 25% Health on Counterattack
items.how_to_find: Can be purchased from the Merchant Mandelgo for 20400 Chroma

items.name: Healing Death
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. On death, the rest of the Expedition recover all Health
items.how_to_find: After foghting Renoir, from the Manor Gardens, head to the lower right corner to find a new path. Go all the way to the end, and grapple across several cliffs until you grapple to a building on a cliff. Climb up the wall structures and pick up the pictos at the end of the path

items.name: Healing Fire
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. Recover 25% Health when attacking a Burning target. Once per turn
items.how_to_find: From the Crumbling Path, turn to the right and up the stairs. Go to the edge and take the rope down. Continue down this path and grapple across. Go through the crawl space to find the pictos by a corpse

items.name: Healing Mark
items.effect: Attributes: Defense. Recover 25% Health on hitting a Marked enemy. Once per turn
items.how_to_find: Can be purchased from Eesda for 9200 Chroma

items.name: Healing Parry
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Recover 3% Health on Parry
items.how_to_find: Can be found at a camp behind the Bourgeon south east of Stone Wave Cliffs after defeating it

items.name: Healing Share
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Crit Rate. Receive 15% of all Heals affecting other characters
items.how_to_find: Can be purchased from Blooraga for 19200 Chroma

items.name: Healing Stun
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Speed. Recover 5% Health on hitting a Stunned target
items.how_to_find: After exiting the Opera House, grapple across until you encounter an Aberration and a Ballet. Defeat the enemies, then pick up the pictos

items.name: Healing Tint Energy
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Healing Tints also give 1 AP
items.how_to_find: From the Flooded Buildings, take the stairs down and head to the end of the path and use your grappling hook to the other side. Take the group of enemies, turn to the left, and you find a sword that's stuck in the ground. There you can pick up the pictos

items.name: Immaculate
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 30% increased damage until a hit is received
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Mask Keeper

items.name: In Medias Res
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Crit Rate. +3 Shields on Battle Start, but max Health is halved
items.how_to_find: From the entrance, go straight until you find a group of Noirs at the end, defeat them and pic up the pictos

items.name: Inverted Affinity
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Crit Rate. Apply Inverted on self for 3 turns on battle start. 50% increased damage while Inverted
items.how_to_find: Sold by Kasumi for 9870 Chroma

items.name: Last Stand Critical
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. 100% Critical Chance while fighting alone
items.how_to_find: Can be obtained upon winning your first match against a Gestral fighter

items.name: Longer Burn
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Burn duration is increased by 2
items.how_to_find: Can be bought from Fusoka for 142625 Chroma  Defeat the Chromatic Aberration. Requieres Esquie's ability to fly to a mountain east of Spring Meadows

items.name: Longer Powerful
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Crit Rate. On applying Powerful, its duration is increased by 2
items.how_to_find: Can be purchased from the Merchant Mandelgo for 20400 Chroma

items.name: Longer Rush
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Speed. On applying Rush, its duration is increased by 2
items.how_to_find: Requires Esquie's fly ability to reach the location. The pictos is located north of the Frost Eveque, which is east of Monoco's Station

items.name: Longer Shell
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. On applying Shell, its duration is increased by 2
items.location: Forgotten Battlefield  The Reacher  The Continent
items.how_to_find: Dropped by a Chalier positioned near a fork in the path at the start  From the Mountain, continue ahead and grapple across to the mountain. Take the path up on the right to find a little course to go through. Carefully make your way across to the other side and pick up the pictos  Dropped by a group of enemies consisting of a Rocher, a Bouchelier, and a Chalier at the yellow forest northeast of The Carousel

items.name: Marking Break
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Apply Mark on Break
items.how_to_find: Sold by the Gestral Merchant Anthonypo for 80040 Chroma

items.name: Marking Shots
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 20% chance to apply Mark on Free Aim shot
items.how_to_find: Found at the end of a path guarded by 2 Lusters, on the path to the left right after encountering the first solo Luster

items.name: Painted Power
items.effect: Attributes: Health. Damage can exceed 9999
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Paintress at the Monolith Peak

items.name: Painter
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Convert all Physical damage to Void damage
items.how_to_find: In the area where the Eveque boss is, head up the stairs on the east side of the room, grapple across, and jump to reach the opposite end. You'll find the body of an expeditioner lying on the platform. The pictos is just beside the body

items.name: Perilous Parry
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. +1 AP on Parry, but damage received is doubled
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Gold Chevaliere in the second lower level

items.name: Piercing Shot
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Crit Rate. 25% increased Free Aim damage. Free Aim shots ignore Shields
items.how_to_find: After destroying the Paint Spike in the Sanctuary Maze, head down to the Gestral Totem area. Behind the totem, you can find a narrow path; enter the path, then drop to the body of water on the right to find the pictos

items.name: Powered Attack
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. On every damage dealt, try to consume 1 AP. If successful, increase damage by 20%
items.how_to_find: In Anger Vale, head to the path on the left then go down the rope beyond the group of Bouchecliers. At the bottom, you can find the pictos near a Contorsionniste

items.name: Powerful Heal
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Speed. Healing an ally also applies Powerful for 1 turn
items.how_to_find: Sold by the Gestral Merchant Anthonypo for 80040 Chroma

items.name: Powerful Mark
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Gain Powerful on hitting a Marked enemy
items.how_to_find: Found in the path to Goblu, on top of a structure guarded by two Steel Chevalieres

items.name: Powerful Revive
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Apply Powerful for 3 turns when revived
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Chromatic Bruler by the beach behind the Gestral Village  Can be picked up after opening the Paint Cage in an area behind Dualliste reached by grappling

items.name: Powerful Shield
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 10% increased damage per Shield Point on self
items.how_to_find: Sold by the Gestral Merchant Anthonypo for 80040 Chroma

items.name: Powerful Shots
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. 20% chance to gain Powerful on Free Aim shot
items.how_to_find: Can be found inside a room blocked by a Paint Spike across the Gestral Doctor

items.name: Powerful on Shell
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Crit Rate. Apply Powerful on applying Shell
items.how_to_find: After unlocking the platform at the end of the path from the Dancing Classes, head into the path on the right, and follow the ribbon on the right side going down to fight a Benisseur. Defeat it to obtain the pictos

items.name: Pro Retreat
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Speed. Allows Flee to be instantaneous
items.how_to_find: Rewarded by Sastro for finding all 9 Lost Gestrals

items.name: Protecting Attack
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Gain Shell for 1 turn on Base Attack
items.how_to_find: Sold by the Gestral Merchant Anthonypo for 100050 Chroma

items.name: Protecting Death
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. On death, allies gain Shell
items.how_to_find: Progress through Sirene until you have been transported through a tunnel to an underground area. Go up the path, past the Fading Man. Head right in the next area, all the way at the end, you can climb up a ledge and pick up the pictos

items.name: Protecting Heal
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Healing an ally also applies Shell for 1 turn
items.how_to_find: Can be purchased from Eragol for 53880 Chroma  Complete the Portier Nevron quest

items.name: Protecting Last Stand
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Gain Shell if fighting alone
items.how_to_find: Obtained upon winning your third fight against a Gestral fighter

items.name: Protecting Shots
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. 20% chance to gain Shell on Free Aim shot
items.how_to_find: Found by going full right after the first stairs at the start and going down between the three columns

items.name: Protecting Tint
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Healing Tints also apply Shell
items.how_to_find: From the Foggy Area, cross the bridges down to the field, before heading into the field, make a U-turn to the right. Cross the plank and pick up the pictos

items.name: Quick Break
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Play again on Breaking a target
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Chromatic Cruler

items.name: Random Defense
items.effect: Attributes: Crit Rate. Damage taken is randomly multiplied by a value between 50% and 200%
items.how_to_find: From The Tainted Sanctuary Expedition Flag, go forward to the large open area with the Ultimate Sakapatate, go up to the slope to the left and under a crawlspace to an area with a Paint Cage, the pictos is found under this cage

items.name: Recovery
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Speed. Recovers 10% Health on turn start
items.how_to_find: Complete the fountain quest

items.name: Rejuvenating Revive
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Apply Regen for 3 turns when revived
items.how_to_find: From the Old Farm, proceed east down the slope until you reach flat ground. Some stacks of lumber will be to your left; continue forward, keeping the lumber to your immediate left, until you can go no further; destroy the paint spike. You'll gain access to an area with the optional boss Chromatic Gault. When entering this area, a path to your immediate right will lead to the pictos

items.name: Revive Paradox
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Play immediately when revived
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Chromatic Danseuse

items.name: Revive Tint Energy
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Revive Tints also give 3 AP
items.how_to_find: After defeating Dualliste, climb up the ropes to find a narrow path between rocks to find the pictos hidden behind trees  Sold by the Gestral Merchant for 67350 Chroma

items.name: Rewarding Mark
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. +2 AP on dealing damage to a Marked target. Once per turn
items.how_to_find: Found at the end of the path to the left past the Cruler after the Coral Cave  Sold by the Gestral Merchant for 53880 Chroma

items.name: Roulette
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Crit Rate. Every hit has a 50% chance to deal either 50% or 200% of its damage
items.how_to_find: Can be found in the Gestral Casino near the arena. Interact with a door to talk to a Gestral Gambler; choose the dialogue option "I don't care." to receive the pictos  Dropped by the Petank near the Eveque bosses

items.name: Rush on Powerful
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Apply Rush on applying Powerful
items.how_to_find: Rewarded for completing Stage 9, Trial 3

items.name: Second Chance
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Crit Rate. Revive with 100% Health. Once per battle
items.how_to_find: Defeat Renoir

items.name: Shared Care
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. When healing an ally, also Heal self for 50% of that value
items.how_to_find: Found by some broken crates on the southern part of the island northwest of the Red Woods

items.name: Shell On Rush
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. Apply Shell on applying Rush
items.how_to_find: Sold by the Gestral Merchant Anthonypo for 100050 Chroma

items.name: Shield Affinity
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. 30% increased damage while having Shields, but receiving any damage always removes all Shields
items.how_to_find: Break the Paint Cage  Sold by the Gestral Merchant for 78575 Chroma

items.name: Shielding Death
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. On death, allies gain 3 Shield points
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Chromatic Chapelier

items.name: Shielding Tint
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Healing Tints also add 2 Shields
items.how_to_find: Requieres Esquie's ability to fly. Found on the ground under wooden crates near the Bourgeon southeast of Forgotten Battlefield

items.name: Shortcut
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Immediately play when falling below 30% Health. Once per battle
items.how_to_find: Head up the stairs at the harbour and defeat the Aberration

items.name: Slowing Break
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. Apply Slow on Break
items.how_to_find: Bought from Fusoka for 97800 Chroma

items.name: Sniper
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. First Free Aim shot each turn deals 200% increased damage and can Break
items.how_to_find: From the Mountain, proceed along the path ahead, and grapple across to the mountain. There will be a group of enemies that consists of 3 Echassier, defeat them to obtain the pictos

items.name: Solidifying
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. +2 Shields when the character's Health falls below 50%. Once per battle
items.how_to_find: Defeat the Giant Sappling  Sold by the Gestral Merchant for 67350 Chroma

items.name: Solo Fighter
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Deal 50% more damage if fighting alone
items.how_to_find: Obtained upon winning your fourth fight against a Gestral fighter   Sold by Grour the Merchant for 97700 Chroma

items.name: SOS Power
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Apply Powerful when falling below 50% Health
items.how_to_find: From the Paintress Shrine, go down the path on the right and cross the narrow stone bridge. Take the path on the right and go up the grassy path, and take another right to the hexagon cliff structures, pick up the pictos behind it

items.name: SOS Rush
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. Apply Rush when falling below 50% Health
items.how_to_find: In the Resinveil Grove, found by a large tree stump

items.name: SOS Shell
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Speed. Apply Shell when falling below 50% Health
items.how_to_find: At the beginning of the area, head forwards to discover a shipwreck. Look for a small passage to the left of the ship's anchor.

items.name: Staggering Attack
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Chance. 50% increased Break damage on Base Attack
items.how_to_find: At the Coral Cave expedition flag, look for a small side area on the right.

items.name: Stay Marked
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Chance. 50% chance to apply Mark when attacking a Marked target
items.how_to_find: In the Tainted Waters area, find and fight the Chromatic Bourgeon  Bought from Fusoka for 122250 Chroma

items.name: Stun Boost
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Chance. 30% increased damage on stunned targets
items.how_to_find: Sold by the Gestral Merchant for 67350 Chroma  Near the boss room with the Ultimate Sakapatate, there is a small cave entrance you can crouch walk into. The pictos is hidden in that area.

items.name: Survivor
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Chance. Prevents death, leaving 1 HP instead. Once per battle.
items.how_to_find: Sold by the Grandis Merchant for 98000 Chroma

items.name: Sweet Kill
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Chance. Recover 50% Health upon killing an enemy
items.how_to_find: Sold by Grour the Merchant for 107471 Chroma

items.name: Tainted
items.effect: Attributes: Defense, Crit Chance. 15% increased damage for each Status Effect on Self
items.how_to_find: Near the Old Farm, defeat the Chromatic Gault  Can be purchased from Eragol for 49391 Chroma

items.name: Teamwork
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. 10% increased damage while all allies are alive
items.how_to_find: Defeat Pinabby to unlock this Pictos for purchasing

items.name: The One
items.effect: Attributes: Critical Rate. Max Health is reduced to 1.
items.how_to_find: From the Chroma Portal, enter the portal and choose an Expeditioner to face the Mime. Only the first victory drops the Pictos

items.name: Time Tint
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Defense. Energy Tints also apply Rush
items.how_to_find: Near Anthonypo after clearing out the enemies in the area  Rewarded for completing Stage 4, Trial 3

items.name: Versatile
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. After a Free Aim shot hit, Base Attack damage is increased by 50% for one turn.
items.how_to_find: Found in the Coral Cave area near the central waterfall  Sold by the Gestral Merchant Anthonypo for 80040 Chroma

items.name: Warming Up
items.effect: Attributes: Health, Crit Rate. 5% increased damage per turn (can stack up to 5 times)
items.how_to_find: Dropped by Grosse Tete in front of Coastal Cave

items.name: Weakness Gain
items.effect: Attributes: Speed, Crit Rate. Gives +1 AP on hitting an Enemy's weakness
items.how_to_find: From the Tainted Cliffs, make your way up and grapple across to the cliffs ahead to find this near a broken airship
